planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with testesprite@gmail.com / testesprite123
Click on the 'Agenda e Atendimento' module card (id: 2)
The Agenda module page is displayed with a calendar or appointment list
Click the button to create a new appointment
Select a patient from the dropdown
Select a doctor and available time slot
The new appointment appears in the appointment list with the correct patient and doctor names
